case_title: TERESA LAU VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RAUL RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO STRIKE IMPROPER ALLEGATIONS AND CLAIM FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. MR. DEVINE REPORTED THAT THE PARTIES HAD REACHED A STIPULATION REGARDING THE MOTION TO STRIKE AND PRESENTED THE STIPULATION TO THE COURT. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED BASED ON THE STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. STIPULATION AND ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf To Attend A Physical And Mental Examination;
Off Calendar Jun-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joseph M. Devine, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc.
Donald E. Krentsa, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Teresa Lau

Defendant Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend A Physical And Mental Examination was argued and submitted.
The motion to compel and independent mental examination fo plaintiff is Denied.
The motion to compel a physical examination of plaintiff Teresa Lau is Granted.
See executed order for details. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RAUL RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO STRIKE IMPROPER ALLEGATIONS AND CLAIM FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES

Appearances:
Joseph Devine of Kern Noda Devine & Segal (474-1900) for defendants and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Devine reported that the parties had reached a stipulation regarding the motion to strike and presented the stipulation to the Court. The Court modified its ruling as follows: granted based on the stipulation of the parties. Stipulation and order signed in open Court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
